title: citrus × aurantium subf. mitsuyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. mitsuyu, also known as sour orange, is a hybrid citrus plant derived from the combination of Citrus aurantium and possibly Citrus maxima. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and support the immune system. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. mitsuyu include its potential to aid in weight loss, reduce inflammation, and improve circulation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Citrus × aurantium subf. mitsuyu can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
